Therefore, there’s zero direct relevance linking any observed physiological outcomes related to birth processes with epigenetic features including enhancement zones within DNA sequences where specific genes may be activated under mechanical stress conditions.

So again—the core point remains clear: No connection exists between these procedural techniques used for managing labor progression and either type of genetic regulator discussed here; hence nothing about transcript levels can reasonably follow directly from those observations.
